name: Staff Productivity
query:
SELECT
  `tabEmployee`.`name` AS "Employee ID:Link/Employee:120",
  `tabEmployee`.`employee_name` AS "Employee Name:Data:200",
  `tabEmployee`.`designation` AS "Designation:Data:150",
  `tabEmployee`.`branch` AS "Branch:Link/Branch:120",
  COALESCE(`timesheet_stats`.`total_hours`, 0) AS "Hours Logged:Float:100",
  COALESCE(`task_stats`.`tasks_completed`, 0) AS "Tasks Completed:Int:100",
  COALESCE(`task_stats`.`tasks_pending`, 0) AS "Tasks Pending:Int:100",
  COALESCE(`project_stats`.`active_projects`, 0) AS "Active Projects:Int:100",
  COALESCE(`project_stats`.`completed_projects`, 0) AS "Completed Projects:Int:100"
FROM `tabEmployee`
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    `t`.`employee`,
    ROUND(SUM(`tt`.`hours`), 1) AS `total_hours`
  FROM `tabTimesheet Detail` `tt`
  JOIN `tabTimesheet` `t` ON `t`.`name` = `tt`.`parent`
  WHERE `t`.`docstatus` = 1
  AND `tt`.`hours` > 0
  GROUP BY `t`.`employee`
) `timesheet_stats` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `timesheet_stats`.`employee`
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    `e`.`name` AS `employee`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `task`.`status` = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) AS `tasks_completed`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `task`.`status` IN ('Open', 'Working', 'Overdue') THEN 1 END) AS `tasks_pending`
  FROM `tabTask` `task`
  JOIN `tabEmployee` `e` ON (
    JSON_CONTAINS(`task`.`_assign`, CONCAT('"', `e`.`user_id`, '"'))
    OR `task`.`owner` = `e`.`user_id`
  )
  WHERE `e`.`user_id` IS NOT NULL AND `e`.`user_id` != ''
  GROUP BY `e`.`name`
) `task_stats` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `task_stats`.`employee`
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    `e`.`name` AS `employee`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `p`.`status` = 'Open' THEN 1 END) AS `active_projects`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `p`.`status` = 'Completed' THEN 1 END) AS `completed_projects`
  FROM `tabProject` `p`
  JOIN `tabEmployee` `e` ON `e`.`user_id` = `p`.`custom_engagement_manager`
  WHERE `p`.`custom_engagement_manager` IS NOT NULL
    AND `p`.`custom_engagement_manager` != ''
  GROUP BY `e`.`name`
) `project_stats` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `project_stats`.`employee`
WHERE `tabEmployee`.`status` = 'Active'
ORDER BY COALESCE(`task_stats`.`tasks_completed`, 0) DESC, `timesheet_stats`.`total_hours` DESC
LIMIT 100

name: Employee Performance
query:
SELECT
    `tabEmployee`.`name` AS "Employee ID:Link/Employee:120",
    `tabEmployee`.`employee_name` AS "Employee Name:Data:200",
    `tabEmployee`.`designation` AS "Designation:Data:150",
    `tabEmployee`.`branch` AS "Branch:Link/Branch:120",
    COALESCE(`ts`.`total_hours`, 0) AS "Hours Logged (30d):Float:100",
    COALESCE(`tc`.`tasks_completed`, 0) AS "Tasks Completed:Int:100",
    COALESCE(`tp`.`tasks_pending`, 0) AS "Tasks Pending:Int:100"
FROM `tabEmployee`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `t`.`employee`, ROUND(SUM(`tt`.`hours`), 1) AS `total_hours`
    FROM `tabTimesheet Detail` `tt`
    JOIN `tabTimesheet` `t` ON `t`.`name` = `tt`.`parent`
    WHERE `t`.`docstatus` = 1 AND `t`.`start_date` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    GROUP BY `t`.`employee`
) `ts` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `ts`.`employee`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`name` AS `employee`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `task`.`status` = 'Completed' AND `task`.`completed_on` >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 END) AS `tasks_completed`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `task`.`status` IN ('Open', 'Working', 'Overdue') THEN 1 END) AS `tasks_pending`
    FROM `tabTask` `task`
    JOIN `tabEmployee` `e` ON (
        JSON_CONTAINS(`task`.`_assign`, CONCAT('"', `e`.`user_id`, '"'))
        OR `task`.`owner` = `e`.`user_id`
    )
    WHERE `e`.`user_id` IS NOT NULL AND `e`.`user_id` != ''
    GROUP BY `e`.`name`
) `tc` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `tc`.`employee`
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT `e`.`name` AS `employee`,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN `task`.`status` IN ('Open', 'Working', 'Overdue') THEN 1 END) AS `tasks_pending`
    FROM `tabTask` `task`
    JOIN `tabEmployee` `e` ON (
        JSON_CONTAINS(`task`.`_assign`, CONCAT('"', `e`.`user_id`, '"'))
        OR `task`.`owner` = `e`.`user_id`
    )
    WHERE `e`.`user_id` IS NOT NULL AND `e`.`user_id` != ''
    GROUP BY `e`.`name`
) `tp` ON `tabEmployee`.`name` = `tp`.`employee`
WHERE `tabEmployee`.`status` = 'Active'
ORDER BY COALESCE(`tc`.`tasks_completed`, 0) DESC
